SCHEDULE NOTE — FRI 07/11
Per supervisor T. Shaw: K. Illard reassigned from dining floor to back corridor cleaning duty, 8:00 PM through close. Standard section coverage reassigned to D. MERCER. No reason given for change. Signed off 2026.07.10.
Daily Task List
STANDARD CHECKLIST — FLOOR SERVICE
□ Clock in through staff terminal before start of shift
□ Check table sections for cleanliness before open
□ Restock napkins and utensils at all floor stations
□ Confirm prize booth inventory with arcade lead
□ Assist kitchen staff during peak service hours
□ Perform full dining area cleanup at end of shift
✕ Do not use back corridor past 8 PM — check with Voss if you need access Ext. 83
□ Submit maintenance request if anything unusual occurs

D. MERCER
MEKA CONNECT
D. MERCER 2026.07.09 — 6:14 PM
hey did you see the new section assignments for friday? shaw moved me to your spot and stuck you in the back. what did you do lol
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.07.09 — 6:31 PM
no idea. he didn't say anything to me about it. just saw it on the board. back corridor cleaning is literally just me by myself after 8?? that's kind of a weird assignment
D. MERCER 2026.07.09 — 6:45 PM
yeah that's weird. voss is usually back there after close. maybe just ask him about it when you get in friday
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.07.11 — 9:47 PM
hey you still up? something is really off tonight. voss isn't back here, nobody is. i submitted a maintenance request because one of the units was making noise from the server room hallway but it was supposed to be powered down. i'm just going to finish and leave
D. MERCER 2026.07.11 — 10:02 PM
which unit? don't go near it, just leave it for cole. glad you're almost done, that section freaks me out after dark
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.07.11 — 10:09 PM
i couldn't tell which one. it sounded like it was coming from behind the wall panel near the server room door. the light in that hallway was off too, i had to use my phone. i already filed the request. clocking out now
D. MERCER 2026.07.11 — 10:14 PM
ok good. get home safe. see you saturday
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.07.12 — 11:22 AM
hey did you hear what happened last night? voss got suspended. shaw won't tell anyone why. are you coming in today?
D. MERCER 2026.07.12 — 12:08 PM
yeah i heard. i'll be in for my shift. i think it's better to just not ask questions about it
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.07.13 — 9:55 AM
you never showed yesterday. you okay?
D. MERCER 2026.07.13 — 10:31 AM
sorry something came up. i'll catch up with you soon

R. COLE
✓ RECOVERED
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 5:42 PM
hey katie, you still on closing tonight?
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.08.02 — 5:58 PM
yeah, why?
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 6:03 PM
nothing serious. just this place gets kind of strange late. you know how it is
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.08.02 — 6:07 PM
strange how? like what kind of strange
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 6:19 PM
cameras glitching. doors locking by themselves. signal drops out for no reason, usually sometime after 10. been happening for a few months now. management knows but nobody's talking about it
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.08.02 — 6:22 PM
that's a maintenance issue right? just needs someone to look at the systems
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 6:31 PM
we looked at it. three times. no fault in any of the hardware we could find. last time someone tried a full system restart to fix it, four archive files just disappeared. completely gone
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.08.02 — 6:34 PM
maybe just a software bug? could be a corrupted update or something
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 6:44 PM
voss said the same thing. then he stopped responding. that was about two weeks ago
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.08.02 — 6:46 PM
what should i do if it starts acting up tonight
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 6:52 PM
do not restart anything. just keep the console open and watch the logs. you'll recognize it when it happens
K. ILLARD — YOU 2026.08.02 — 6:55 PM
recognize what exactly? cole what are you not telling me
R. COLE 2026.08.02 — 7:01 PM
i think something is using the system. not a bug. something deliberate. just watch the logs and do
[ TRANSMISSION LOST — CONNECTION DROPPED ]
— message cut off —

[ RESTRICTED THREAD — RECOVERED FROM ARCHIVE PARTITION ]
A. KEEP 2027.03.01 — 11:42 PM
katie. i know you don't know who i am. that's intentional. i've been watching this system for a while and i need you to listen carefully.
K. ILLARD — YOU 2027.03.01 — 11:49 PM
who are you? how did you get into this system?
A. KEEP 2027.03.01 — 11:51 PM
the same way anyone gets in. i looked until i found a door they forgot to close. meka has a lot of those.
K. ILLARD — YOU 2027.03.01 — 11:53 PM
what do you want
A. KEEP 2027.03.01 — 11:55 PM
i want you to get out of that building. tonight. don't finish your shift. don't clock out. just leave.
K. ILLARD — YOU 2027.03.01 — 11:57 PM
why would i do that? i'll lose my job
A. KEEP 2027.03.02 — 12:01 AM
the units in that facility have been active every night for the last three weeks. not scheduled active. the other kind. something changed after the last system restart and i don't think meka knows what it changed into.
K. ILLARD — YOU 2027.03.02 — 12:04 AM
how do you know this
A. KEEP 2027.03.02 — 12:05 AM
because i've been pulling logs from this system for months and what's in them doesn't match what meka is telling anyone. there's a gap between what they recorded and what actually happened. someone filled that gap with something and i don't know what.
K. ILLARD — YOU 2027.03.02 — 12:08 AM
i can hear something in the arcade right now
A. KEEP 2027.03.02 — 12:08 AM
leave now. do not go toward it. go out the front and don't look back.
[ NO RESPONSE FROM K. ILLARD — THREAD CLOSED BY SYSTEM ]
— END OF RECOVERED THREAD —
MAINTENANCE REQUESTS
SUBMITTED BY K. ILLARD
STAFF-003
MR-0047 RESOLVED
2026.03.14 // ARCADE SECTION
Token dispenser on cabinet row C is jammed. Coins are going in but nothing coming out. Kids keep trying it. Please fix before weekend.
Engineering response: Dispenser replaced 2026.03.15. Closed.
MR-0081 RESOLVED
2026.06.02 // DINING FLOOR SECTION B
Overhead light in section B keeps flickering. It's been going on for a few days. Customers have been asking about it.
Facilities response: Bulb and relay replaced 2026.06.05. Closed.
MR-0094 PENDING
2026.07.11 — 10:06 PM // BACK CORRIDOR / SERVER ROOM HALLWAY
Was assigned to clean the back corridor tonight. Around 9:45 I heard sounds coming from behind the wall panel near the server room door — like movement, or maybe something mechanical cycling. The hallway light was also out. I couldn't tell which unit it was and I didn't open anything. The area was listed as clear for the evening. Voss was not present. Submitting so engineering is aware.
No response on file. Ticket status: open.

BULLETIN BOARD
MANAGEMENT ANNOUNCEMENTS & CORPORATE COMMUNICATIONS
STAFF-004
Management Announcements
ADMINISTRATION — 2026.07.14
Effective immediately, all staff are reminded that back-of-house areas including the server room corridor, kitchen staging, and storage sections are restricted after 8:00 PM. Access requires direct authorization from a supervisor or security officer. This policy is now strictly enforced.
T. SHAW — FACILITY DIRECTOR — 2026.07.10
Mascot units will undergo routine diagnostic checks after closing hours this week. Staff should ensure all guest areas are cleared and secured before end of shift. Do not approach units during or after diagnostic cycles.
ADMINISTRATION — 2026.07.08
Security Officer A. Voss is temporarily unavailable. All facility security questions should be directed to T. Shaw until further notice. Floor staff should not attempt to contact Voss directly.
Meka Corporation — Staff Bulletin
MEKA DINER
& FUN CENTER
WHERE EVERY MOMENT IS A MEMORY
★ EMPLOYEE SPOTLIGHT Valued team members — this month's recognition goes to D. MERCER for outstanding guest service and consistent team support. We are proud to have dedicated staff like D. Mercer representing Meka Diner each and every shift.
★ SAFETY REMINDER 7 days a week, Meka Corporation remains committed to the safety of every team member. If you observe unusual activity — including mechanical behavior outside of scheduled operations — please report it to your supervisor immediately. Your safety and the safety of our guests is our top priority.
★ FROM MANAGEMENT Know that recent weeks have brought uncertainty. Meka Corporation remains committed to the safety and wellbeing of its staff. Questions about operational changes should be directed through the appropriate supervisor channels. We appreciate your continued professionalism and discretion.

PERSONNEL FILE // S. VANDYKE
FILE IDID-0214-R
NAMES. VANDYKE
ROLEFloor Service Staff — RECLASSIFIED
STATUSFLAGGED — ACTIVE MONITOR
CLEARANCELevel 0 — SUSPENDED PENDING REVIEW
INTERNAL SECURITY NOTE — NOT FOR GENERAL DISTRIBUTION
Vandyke's transfer to the Fairgrounds was a containment measure, not a disciplinary action. Security Division obtained a partial transcript of a conversation between Vandyke and an unidentified external party in which specific operational schedules, unit maintenance windows, and back corridor access timings were discussed. The nature of the information suggests Vandyke had access to — or was given access to — internal systems above their stated clearance level. Ongoing investigation. Do not alert Vandyke. Do not log this file in the standard archive index.
ADDENDUM — T. SHAW // 2027.06.20
I want it on record that I did not authorize Vandyke's system access beyond Level 0. If someone gave them elevated credentials, it was not through me. I've flagged this with M. Parish but have not received a response. Someone is covering something up and I don't think it's Vandyke doing it alone.
FILE ACCESSED VIA DIAGNOSTIC CHANNEL — NOT LOGGED
